# Infineon — 800V DC Power Semiconductors for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## CoolGaN 800V-to-50V IBC
- >98% efficiency
- 2,500 W/in3 power density
- 60x60x11mm package
- Reference design available

## CoolGaN 800V-to-12V IBC
- 98.2% peak efficiency
- >2,300 W/in3
- Only 8mm tall
- Reference design available

## CoolSiC JFET Hot-Swap Controller
- REF_XDP701_4800 reference design
- NVIDIA co-designed
- Safe 800V DC hot-insertion

## SolarEdge SST Partnership
- 2-5 MW solid-state transformer
- 13.8-34.5kV direct to 800-1500V DC
- >99% efficiency
- Development stage (announced Nov 2025)
- Game-changer when it ships
